mapper.sql: SELECT j.id, j.job_name, j.job_group, j.dept_id, j.invoke_target, j.cron_expression, j.misfire_policy, j.concurrent, j.status, j.remark, j.create_by, j.create_time, j.update_by, j.update_time, j.deleted FROM sys_job j
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_job (job_name, job_group, invoke_target, cron_expression, misfire_policy, concurrent, status, remark, create_by) VALUES (#{jobName}, #{jobGroup}, #{invokeTarget}, #{cronExpression}, #{misfirePolicy}, #{concurrent}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_job
job_name = #{jobName}, job_group = #{jobGroup}, invoke_target = #{invokeTarget}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, misfire_policy = #{misfirePolicy}, concurrent = #{concurrent}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: WHERE job_name = #{jobName} AND job_group = #{jobGroup} AND deleted = 0
WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_job j WHERE j.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_job SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_job SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
